case_title: GENERAL MOTORS COMPANY, A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100223397) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENERAL MOTORS COMPANY, A DELAWARE CORPORATION
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-22-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100223397) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENERAL MOTORS COMPANY, A DELAWARE CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-22-2024 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-20-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-29-2024 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE

ORDER DENYING COMPLEX DESIGNATION FOR FAILURE TO FILE APPLICATION REQUESTING DESIGNATION.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100227666) TJE COMPLAINT IS BEING DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BECAUSE THE ALLEGATIONS ARE INSTEAD BEING BROUGHT IN THE FORM OF AMENDED COMPLAINT IN CASE NO. CGC-22-606961, ETC.
